caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt that reads "I NEVER DO SHIT" is seated in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. Behind him, the walls are adorned with several framed photographs, and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt and grey pants stands to his right. Racks of colorful clothing are visible in the background. On the bottom left of the scene, a logo reads "THE BOX", and on the bottom right, a red logo reads "ROCKET FLY". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and shifting his facial expressions, moving from a focused look with his mouth open to a slight smile and then turning his head to the side. He remains seated in the same position throughout the clip.
